message:
fix: detect toon_rust binary shipped as 'toon'

Remove the hard name ban in isToonRustBinary() — the --help output
validation is sufficient to distinguish the Rust binary. Also add
'toon' as a fallback in findTruBinary() after 'tru'.

Closes #1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
